summary: Iteration 229: Tested Unified Access Model Phase 1 & Phase 2 features - Manager login flows, sidebar role filtering, role badge colors, Sales Manager dashboard with Team Command Center. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified successfully.

tests: Sales Manager login via /api/auth/login with sales.manager@konekt.co.tz / Manager123! - returns role 'sales_manager'
Finance Manager login via /api/auth/login with finance@konekt.co.tz / Finance123! - returns role 'finance_manager'
Admin login via /api/auth/login with admin@konekt.co.tz - still works correctly
Sales Manager login via /api/admin/auth/login - allowed (role in gate list)
Finance Manager login via /api/admin/auth/login - allowed (role in gate list)
GET /api/auth/me returns correct role for sales_manager
GET /api/auth/me returns correct role for finance_manager

visible: ALL sections - Dashboard, Commerce, Catalog, Customers, Partners, Growth & Affiliates, Finance, Team/Performance, Operations, Reports & Analytics, Settings

tests: Sales Manager badge shows 'Sales Manager' in teal color (bg-teal-100 text-teal-700)
Finance Manager badge shows 'Finance Manager' in amber color (bg-amber-100 text-amber-700)
Admin badge shows 'admin' in red color (bg-red-100 text-red-700)
GET /api/admin/dashboard/team-kpis returns leaderboard array with score and label fields
Settings link hidden in profile dropdown for Sales Manager
Settings link hidden in profile dropdown for Finance Manager
Settings link visible in profile dropdown for Admin

seed_data_creation: Manager users seeded via startup_event in server.py (sales_manager, finance_manager)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Access Model Phase 1 & 2 fully implemented and tested. Manager roles (sales_manager, finance_manager) can login via unified /login page and are redirected to /admin. Sidebar filtering works correctly based on roles array in adminNavigation.js. Sales Manager sees Team Command Center dashboard with team KPIs, leaderboard, team performance table. Finance Manager sees standard admin dashboard. Role badges have correct colors (teal for sales_manager, amber for finance_manager, red for admin). Profile dropdown hides Settings link for non-admin roles.
